title: Tales Beyond the Galaxy
overview: Space Vessel Iris and its crew encounter a troubling discovery as they embark to what they believe to be an uninhabited planet. After a devastating tragedy, an astronaut struggles to complete his interstellar mission to rescue a lost crew. A brilliant young woman on a four year mission to an alien planet finds herself remembering her childhood and facing her inner demons. An astronaut on the Goldilocks Missions, searches the stars for a new home, when a circuit failure in his ship threatens to jeopardize the mission. Two elite astronauts wake up in the abyss of space attempting to return to their stranded ship.
